title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Lens tenant data (tenant name, ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) displays correctly in Poly Studio Mobile app under Poly Support/App check for registered users
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or profile icon to access the side menu.
5. Tap on "App Check" or "App Info" within the Poly Support section.
6. Verify that the user is registered on a Lens tenant (check that tenant information is displayed).

7. Review the following fields displayed on the screen:
   - App version
   - Tenant name
   - Tenant ID
   - User ID
   - App ID
   - Last connection date
8. Cross-reference each field with the expected tenant data from the Lens backend/admin portal.
expected: All tenant data fields (app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) displayed in Poly Studio Mobile → Poly Support → App Check match the correct Lens tenant registration data.
